generated.sfSnapshot: Success Factors Report Modified See Ben.xlsx (2026-05-13 snapshot)

confidenceNotes: 6 / 8 team members matched to TNA sheets exactly by name.
0 matched fuzzily (likely same person, name spelled differently in TNA).
2 did not match any TNA sheet (no TNA coverage or name not in TNA staff list).
TNA required-items inferred as 'all items on the sheet(s) where this person is listed as staff'. This is an over-approximation; tick-mark parsing would refine it.

high.title: Validity bug: IPL-AU-DL1Y
high.detail: Validity in TNA looks like days entered into months (365, 730 or 1825). Item may be tracked as never-expiring.
high.suggestedAction: Verify intended validity in months (likely 12 / 24 / 60). Fix the TNA cell.

high.title: Validity bug: IPL-AU-LMHWPRM
high.detail: Validity in TNA looks like days entered into months (365, 730 or 1825). Item may be tracked as never-expiring.

low.title: Cumulative TNA spelling drift across the project
low.detail: From the data-quality analysis: ~109 TNA item-name spellings are 95-99% similar to an SF item name (likely typos), and ~8 'Process Technicain' variants exist alongside 'Process Technician'. None block compliance today, but they break joins, audits, and future automation.
low.suggestedAction: Run the typo-fix pass (mechanical, ~1 day of supervised review).
